2604.09911.title: The Rise and Fall of $G$ in AGI
2604.09911.paper_summary: In the psychological literature the term `general intelligence' describes correlations between abilities and not simply the number of abilities. This paper connects Spearman's $g$-factor from psychometrics, measuring a positive manifold, to the implicit ``$G$-factor'' in claims about artificial general intelligence (AGI) performance on temporally structured benchmarks. By treating LLM benchmark batteries as cognitive test batteries and model releases as subjects, principal component analysis is applied to a models $\times$ benchmarks $\times$ time matrix spanning 39 models (2019--2025) and 14 benchmarks. Preliminary results confirm a strong positive manifold in which all 28 pairwise correlations positive across 8 benchmarks. By analyzing the spectrum of the benchmark correlation through time, PC1 explains 90\% of variance on a 5-benchmark core battery ($n=19$)) reducing to 77\% by 2024. On a four benchmark battery, PC1 is found to peak at 92\% of the variance between 2023--2024 and reduce to 64\% with the arrival of reasoning-specialized models in 2024. This is coincident with a rotation in the G-factor as models outsource `reasoning' to tools. The analysis of partial correlation matrices through time provides evidence for the evolution of specialization beneath the positive manifold of general intelligence (AI-hedgehog) encompassing diverse high dimensional problem solving systems (AI-foxes). In strictly psychometric terms, AI models exhibit general intelligence suppressing specialized intelligences. LLMs invert the ideal of substituting complicated models with parsimonious mechanisms, a `Ptolemaic Succession' of theories, with architectures of increasing hierarchical complication and capability.
2604.09911.paper_summary_zh: 在心理學文獻中，術語「一般智力」描述的是能力之間的相關性，而不僅僅是能力的數量。本文將斯皮爾曼的 $g$-因子與人工一般智能（AGI）在時間結構基準上的表現隱含的「$G$-因子」相連接，這是來自心理測量學的概念，測量一個正的多樣性。通過將大型語言模型（LLM）基準電池視為認知測試電池，並將模型釋放視為受試者，對一個涵蓋39個模型（2019--2025年）和14個基準的模型 $\times$ 基準 $\times$ 時間矩陣應用了主成分分析。初步結果確認了一個強的正多樣性，其中所有28個配對相關性在8個基準上都是正的。通過時間分析基準相關性的光譜，PC1解釋了5個基準核心電池（$n=19$）上90\%的變異，到2024年減少至77\%。在四個基準電池上，PC1在2023--2024年間的變異峰值達到92\%，隨著2024年推理專門模型的出現，變異減少至64\%。這與G因子的旋轉一致，因為模型將「推理」外包給工具。通過時間分析部分相關矩陣提供了證據，顯示在涵蓋多樣化高維問題解決系統（AI-foxes）的正多樣性之下，專業化的演變。在嚴格的心理測量學術語中，AI模型表現出一般智力，抑制專門智力。大型語言模型顛覆了用簡約機制替代複雜模型的理想，形成了一種「托勒密繼承」的理論，伴隨著日益複雜的層級架構和能力。
2604.09911.author: David C. Krakauer et.al.
